description_long: This is a classic outdoor swing set featuring two individual swings suspended from a sturdy horizontal metal bar. The frame is constructed from tubular metal, with four angled support legs providing stability and a crossbar at the top for structural integrity. The swings themselves consist of black flexible seats attached to the crossbar by metal chains, allowing for smooth back-and-forth motion. The frame is painted in a combination of dark blue for the top bar and yellowish-green for the legs, giving it a playful yet durable appearance. The design is open and accessible, with no additional safety barriers or enclosures. This type of swing set is commonly found in public parks, schoolyards, and residential playgrounds.
description: A metal swing set with two black swings suspended by chains from a blue and yellow-green frame. The structure is open and sturdy, designed for outdoor playground use.
description_view_0: Front view showing both swings hanging from the horizontal bar, with the full width of the frame and both seats visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of the frame, a single swing seat, and the angled support legs.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing both swings and the back of the frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with one swing seat and the angled support legs visible.
